work/1.title: 3D Real-Time Cinematic Environment Production
work/1.description: Responsible for the creation of a large-scale, fantasy-inspired library environment for a realistic animation film. The story takes place in the Emberfall Kingdom, where a princess narrates a tale to the audience within the library setting. The environment was designed to support this narrative moment, emphasizing atmosphere, scale, and storytelling through space. From moodboard to spatial composition, I modeled all environment props from scratch, along with creating clean and optimized UV maps to ensure a high-quality real-time workflow with immersive library space in complex architectural details. Beyond environment production, I edited the movie trailer, handling both video editing and sound design to enhance the cinematic tone and emotional impact of the project. Texturing and PBR material creation, the princess character, including her animation and textures, was developed by other artists in our group.
work/1.tools: Unreal Engine, Blender, Substance 3D Painter, Adobe Photoshop & Premiere Pro

work/2.title: 3D Character Customization & Animation
work/2.description: Responsible for the creation of 3D character costumes and in-game visual assets. Full 3D costume construction in Blender, followed by UV unwrapping, mesh optimization, and skin-weight painting for proper in-game deformation. Texturing was completed in Substance 3D Painter, with a focus on material consistency and visual clarity. In addition to that I also contributed to the production of 2D assets such as illustrations, textures, UI visual components like buttons, screens, and interactive elements, ensuring visual coherence across more than 30 mobile game levels and over 100 characters, supporting a large-scale content pipeline I played a key role in the production of Fashion Battle (120M+ downloads), contributing to fashion concept development, 3D modeling, texturing, and UI-related visual design. Beyond production work, I actively participated in playtests, providing feedback on gameplay mechanics, visual design, and user experience. I also worked closely with development, design, and production teams to ensure quality control, consistency, and smooth integration of assets into the final product.
work/2.tools: Unity, Blender, Substance 3D Painter, Adobe Photoshop & Premiere Pro

work/3.title: VR Combat Game Environment & Animation Production
work/3.description: Boneheads Raid is a VR game project where players defend a sacred idol against waves of attacking skeleton enemies in an immersive VR environment. In this project, I was responsible for environment layout, VFX, character rigging and animation. I created dynamic light and trail effects for the skeletons’ swords, as well as particle effects that are triggered during hit reaction animations in Unity, for enhancing the combat feedback. Additionally, I developed custom birth and death materials integrated with keyframe animations, allowing the skeletons to dissolve or vanish in a visually engaging way during their spawn and death moments.
work/3.tools: Unity, Blender, Adobe Photoshop & Premiere Pro

work/4.title: Cozy Zen Game Design & Development
work/4.description: Cozy Zen is my master thesis project that explores cozy game experiences through the concept of a winter Zen garden. The goal was to create a calming yet engaging interactive game environment that offers players a sense of relaxation and presence. Within a very limited timeframe, I independently developed both the theoretical thesis and a fully playable prototype. I was responsible for the entire production process, including animation, visual design, and game development, bringing the concept to life by using Blender and Unity. I also utilized Codex to support the coding process and gameplay implementation. The project itself became a highly rewarding and educational journey from learning programming fundamentals to experimenting with different mechanics and refining every detail from concept to playable prototype.
work/4.tools: Unity, Blender, Substance 3D Painter, Adobe Photoshop & Premiere Pro

work/5.title: Spotify Album Canvas Design
work/5.description: Designed the visual identity for the Spotify release of the hip hop album “Bulut” (meaning “cloud” in English), including the album presentation and accompanying Canvas animations. My work focused on creating short-form motion visuals inspired by hip hop, street style, format, combining video editing, motion design, and rhythm-driven visual storytelling. These visuals were crafted to enhance the listening experience while aligning with the album’s mood and atmospheric tone. All assets were optimized with platform-specific constraints and user interaction patterns in mind, ensuring both visual impact and seamless integration within Spotify’s interface.

work/6.title: Jazz Fest Commercial Design
work/6.description: In this project, I was the art director, who was also responsible for a commercial motion piece for a jazz festival, combining rhythm-based editing, typography, and music-synced visual storytelling aligned with the festival’s brand tone. Beyond motion design, I like to keep this project in my portfolio because this is how we dreamed, imagined, and created in an analog way the things we wanted to develop before AI-assisted tools emerged. Moreover, you will find a behind-the-scenes video of the full visual production process, including preparing the model through makeup styling and directing a professional photoshoot to create high-quality visual assets for the campaign. The final output integrated motion design with photographed material, focusing on rhythm, composition, and brand identity. The project was submitted to a competition and received the “Mansion Award” recognition.

work/7.title: Juste Debout Campaign Design
work/7.description: Developed campaign visuals and motion content for Juste Debout, focusing on hip hop rhythms, street dance culture, and dynamic storytelling. As one of the world’s leading hip hop dance events since 2002, the project required a strong and authentic visual language that reflects both its global identity and rich history. I created a range of social media and print assets, carefully adapting each for digital platforms to ensure clarity, impact, and consistency across formats. The overall visual direction aimed to capture the raw energy of the stage while maintaining a cohesive and recognizable campaign identity.
work/7.tools: Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro & After Effects

work/8.title: Western Union Commercial Design
work/8.description: Worked on commercial projects for Western Union, producing animated promotional materials using Adobe After Effects. The content was localized into multiple languages, including Greek, Georgian, Russian, and Ukrainian, to effectively reach and engage diverse international audiences.
work/8.tools: Adobe Photoshop, Premiere Pro & After Effects

work/9.title: Wholy Cow Beef Tallow Branding, Packaging and Campaign Design
work/9.description: This project for Wholy Cow Beef Tallow aimed to build a distinctive and cohesive brand identity through logo and packaging design. Multiple label concepts were explored and refined, aligning the visual direction with the brand’s natural positioning and target audience. The final result is a clean, bold, and authentic identity that communicates quality and trust. The packaging is available in two sizes: tall and small. As a startup, Wholy Cow Ossewit has successfully moved into production and is currently distributed in the Netherlands. AI-assisted motion and static visuals were developed for social media campaigns, extending the brand’s presence with high-impact, modern advertising content.
work/9.tools: Adobe Illustrator & Photoshop, Premiere Pro, AI-assisted tools

work/10.title: Illustrations
work/10.description: Personal illustration work exploring series, composition, color, and narrative tone.
